title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (2) لسنة 1996 بشأن إشغال الطرق العامة
title_en: Legislative Decree No. (18) of 1995 concerning the Conditions and Rules for Consolidating Previous Service Periods for Officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, subject to the provisions of the Law Regulating Retirement Pensions and Benefits for Officers and Personnel of the Bahrain Defence Force and Public Security, promulgated by Legislative Decree No. (11) of 1976 as amended
